text:
The Season 1 Part 2 box set of the original Fullmetal Alchemist anime series was released by Funimation on November 20, 2007. It contains twelve episodes on three discs:
Volume 5: The Cost of Living
Episode 17: House of the Waiting Family
Episode 18: Marcoh's Notes
Episode 19: The Truth Behind Truths
Episode 20: Soul of the Guardian
Volume 6: Captured Souls
Episode 21: The Red Glow
Episode 22: Created Human
Episode 23: Fullmetal Heart
Episode 24: Bonding Memories
Volume 7: Reunion on Yock Island
Episode 25: Words of Farewell
Episode 26: Her Reason
Episode 27: Teacher
Episode 28: All Is One, One Is All

Synopsis

Deep within the confines of a secret State laboratory Ed's morality will be put to the ultimate test, even as elsewhere Al is left to battle for both his life and his sanity. As rumors of military corruption and conspiracy draw others into the investigation, those closest to the Elrics look to suffer the most.
